drivers.notes: Uni-Q array — coaxial with the mid-bass

description.en: Compact active bookshelf pair built around the Uni-Q coaxial driver array and a Music Integrity Engine DSP. 100 W per cabinet plus full network streaming (AirPlay 2, Chromecast, Roon, Spotify/Tidal Connect, Bluetooth 5.0) make it a desk-friendly all-in-one — speakers connect to each other either over the supplied cable or wirelessly via KEF's W2 link.
description.es: Bookshelf activo compacto construido alrededor del array coaxial Uni-Q y el DSP Music Integrity Engine. 100 W por gabinete y streaming completo (AirPlay 2, Chromecast, Roon, Spotify/Tidal Connect, Bluetooth 5.0) lo convierten en un all-in-one ideal para escritorio — los parlantes se conectan entre sí por cable o inalámbricamente vía el sistema W2 de KEF.
